creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The update/fresh installation of port databases/grass results on all FreeBSD boxes I have access to (9.1-STABLE through 10.0-CURRENT, most recent buildworld) in the below shown error and the port isn't capable of being installed.


[...]
